text.title: Freelancer Discovery Call Template Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Operator spends 18 min of 30 min talking about the service; prospect gives polite no.
antipattern.fix: Time-block the call: 5 min context + 18 min listening + 5 min next-steps + 2 min buffer.

antipattern.symptom: Operator avoids asking budget; proposal priced too low; revenue lost.
antipattern.fix: Use indirect budget probe: 'What are you spending today on this?' or 'What range have you budgeted?'

antipattern.symptom: Discovery sends 8-page proposal; sits in inbox for 3 weeks.
antipattern.fix: One-pager + Calendly link; multi-page only for procurement-required clients.

antipattern.symptom: Operator passes on a 18-score lead because of vibes; revenue lost.
antipattern.fix: Use 5-axis scorecard; document the score; reconsider sub-12 only with explicit reason.
